Title: Boromir, Bearer of Council
GameText: While Boromir is the Ring-bearer, at the start of each skirmish involving him, add 3 burdens or wound him twice. Each time Boromir wins a skirmish, discard each minion he is skirmishing.

Title: Durin III, Dwarven Lord
GameText: Damage +1. While you can spot 2 Dwarves, Durin III is twilight cost –2. Durin III is strength +1 for each artifact and each possession he bears.

Title: Elendil, The Tall
GameText: To play, spot 2 Men. Fellowship: Play an artifact on Elendil to make the move limit +1 for this turn. Regroup: Discard a artifact to liberate a site.

Title: Freca, Hungry Savage
GameText: When you play Freca, you may spot another Man to take control of a site. When Freca is killed, the Free Peoples player may liberate a site.

Title: Galadriel, Bearer of Wisdom
GameText: While Galadriel bears an artifact or The One Ring, she is resistance +1 for each companion you can spot.

Title: Gil-galad, Elven High King
GameText: To play, spot 2 companions. Regroup: Exert Gil-galad to wound each wounded minion.

Title: Gimli, Bearer of Grudges
GameText: Damage +1. While Gimli is the Ring-bearer, at the start of each skirmish involving him, add 2 burdens or 2 threats. While Gimli is damage +X, he is resistance +X.

Title: Glorfindel, Revealed in Wrath
GameText: When Glorfindel is in your starting fellowship, his twilight cost is –2. Skirmish: Reveal the top card of your draw deck. You may exert Glorfindel to make a Nazgûl he is skirmishing strength –X, where X is the twilight cost of the card revealed.

Title: Goldberry, River-daughter
GameText: Each time the fellowship moves to a river, heal Goldberry and Tom Bombadil. Skirmish: If the fellowship is at a river, exert Goldberry to make a companion strength +1.

Title: Gollum, Dark as Darkness
GameText: Shadow: Exert Gollum twice to exert the Ring-bearer. Shadow: Remove a burden to add . Skirmish: Remove a burden to add . Regroup: Remove a burden to add . Regroup: Exert Gollum twice to wound the Ring-bearer.

Title: Host of Moria, Legion of the Underdeeps
GameText: When you play Host of Moria, you may play a card from your discard pile.

Title: Isildur, Bearer of Heirlooms
GameText: While Isildur is the Ring-bearer, at the start of each skirmish involving him, add 2 burdens or exert 3 companions. While Isildur bears The One Ring or an artifact, each knight is strength +1.

Title: Ithil Stone
GameText: To play, exert a or minion. At the start of each of your Shadow phases, you may draw a card. Shadow: Discard this artifact to play a minion. Its twilight cost is –3.

Title: Knife of the Galadhrim
GameText: Bearer must be a Man. If bearer is Aragorn, he may bear this hand weapon in addition to 1 other hand weapon. Skirmish: Discard this possession to wound a minion bearer is skirmishing.

Title: Library of Orthanc
GameText: Shadow: Play an minion to stack the top card of your draw deck on this card. Skirmish: Remove and discard a Free Peoples card stacked here to make an minion strength +1. Regroup: Remove to take an card stacked here into hand.

Title: Narsil, Blade of the Faithful
GameText: Bearer must be a Man. If bearer is Elendil or Isildur, he is strength +1 for each artifact you can spot (limit +6). Response: If bearer is about to take a wound, exert 2 Men to prevent that.

Title: Radagast, The Brown
GameText: The move limit is +1. Each time the fellowship moves during the regroup phase, each opponent may discard 2 cards from hand to draw 2 cards.

Title: Ring of Fury
GameText: Bearer must be a Dwarf. Bearer is damage +2. Regroup: Spot a Dwarf that is damage +X to heal X Dwarves. Discard this artifact.

Title: Ring of Ire
GameText: Bearer must be The Witch-king. Skirmish: Exert bearer twice to make a minion damage +1. Response: If a player reconciles, return bearer to his owner’s hand.

Title: Sauron, The Lord of the Rings
GameText: Damage +2. Enduring. Fierce. For each burden you spot, threat you spot, and site you control, Sauron’s twilight cost is –1.

Title: Slippery as Fishes
GameText: While Gollum is at a mountain, river, or underground site, he is strength +2. Regroup: Spot Gollum to reveal your hand. Place all Shadow cards revealed beneath your draw deck. Discard this condition.

Title: Smeagol, Bearer of Great Secrets
GameText: Ring-bound. To play, add a burden. Each time the fellowship moves, place an unbound companion in the dead pile. Regroup: If Sméagol is the Ring-bearer, add 2 burdens to discard each minion.

Title: Soldier's Cache
GameText: Fortification. At the start of your maneuver phase, you may spot 3 rangers or exert a Man to transfer this condition to a minion. Wound that minion. Regroup: Exert a ranger to reinforce a token.

Title: The One Ring, The Binding Ring
GameText: Fellowship: Add 2 burdens to play a ring from your draw deck. Maneuver: Exert bearer to wear The One Ring until the regroup phase. While wearing The One Ring, each time the Ring-bearer is about to take a wound, add a burden instead.

Title: Tom Bombadil, The Master
GameText: To play, remove 2 burdens or 2 threats. Skirmish: Spot 2 companions and exert Tom Bombadil X times, where X is the fellowship’s site number, to cancel a skirmish involving a companion.
